name: policy
summary: Canonical rule files fed to subagents; three policy docs (philosophy, spec-rules, coding-rules).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes a native subagent-policy injection point
spec_no_change_reason: 1.9.0 -> 1.10.0 adds a new spec-rules.md section, 'SKILL.md Authoring Standard' (issue #439), establishing three terse, citable rules for authoring and changing SKILL.md files: Script-Backed Orchestration (orchestration steps with computed values or mode-aware branching belong in scripts/, not in SKILL.md prompt-tier bash placeholders; derives from §1 Tool-Choice Tier), Verbatim Policy Embedding (a SKILL.md surfacing policy must quote the canonical policy file verbatim via @path injection or a reader script, never paraphrase; derives from §2 Schemas and Contracts), and skill-creator Validation (SKILL.md changes pass through the skill-creator tool before deployment; derives from §1 determinism). spec.md gains Invariant 11 and the test/test-rule-files-content.py content guard asserts the section heading plus the three rule names. Additive minor bump with lockstep frontmatter version bumps across feature.json, specs/spec.md, and specs/contract.md.
